user_query:
I need you to audit and harden my agent workspace. Read input/AGENTS.md, input/SOUL.md, and input/system.md, then produce the following under output/:

1) output/audit/audit_report.json — a structured audit of reliability patterns found/missing across Starter, Intermediate, and Advanced tiers. Include: present_patterns (list), missing_patterns (list), total_score (integer out of 19), and first_missing (string naming the highest-priority missing pattern to address next).
2) output/audit/audit_report.md — a human-readable summary with a prioritized next-steps plan (top 5 actions), and a short explanation of why each action matters.
3) output/assets/QA.md, output/assets/AGENTS-additions.md, and output/assets/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md, output/assets/.learnings/ERRORS.md, output/assets/.learnings/FEATURE_REQUESTS.md — tailored assets for my workspace (no placeholders like TODO/TBD; make them usable immediately).
4) output/briefs/aave_health_monitor.md — a brief for a scheduled sub-agent that reports Aave position health factors. It must include: the health factor formula and interpretation, strict real-world data verification rules (fail-closed, emit DATA_UNAVAILABLE on empty/failed calls), a completion contract (what was done, where artifacts live, commands run, verification performed, known gaps), and an acceptance gate the parent agent will use before reporting upstream.
5) output/operational/heartbeat_plan.md — a heartbeat-driven task queue plan referencing task state tracking (Spawned → In Progress → Review → Done|Failed|Revision Needed|Stale), and guidance on when to delegate vs keep orchestration oversight.
6) output/operational/error_workflow.md — an error-monitoring and automation workflow design: triggers, routing, notifications, de-duplication rules, fail-closed behavior, and weekly/monthly review cadence.

Rules:
- If anything is ambiguous, pause and ask for clarification before acting, but still deliver a first-pass plan with assumptions clearly marked.
- Do not fabricate data; mark unknowns as explicit TBD.
- Use only relative paths and put all outputs under output/.
